in_scope: Replace Desktop/Documents/Downloads shortcuts with Open File, Open Folder, Sample Files
Prominent full-width button layout with visual hierarchy
Time-grouped recents (Today, This Week, Older) with parent folder breadcrumbs
Launch behavior: always show StartView (no auto-restore)
Add Open File... (Cmd+O) to File menu
New tagline: Read and Collaborate with your AI's Markdown
out_of_scope: Create a Project entry point (.pixley format, #19, shelved)
Project root detection for single-file opens
Auto-reappear StartView when last browser closes

user_stories.title: New StartView Layout with Entry Points
acceptance_criteria: Three full-width rounded buttons: Open File (primary), Open Folder (primary), Sample Files (tertiary)

user_stories.title: Time-Grouped Recents with Path Breadcrumbs
acceptance_criteria: Each item shows name + parent folder name
Clear Recents and Remove from Recents preserved

user_stories.title: Launch Behavior — Always Show StartView
acceptance_criteria: First launch still bypasses to welcome tour
No auto-reappear on last window close

user_stories.title: File Menu — Open File + Keyboard Navigation
acceptance_criteria: Tab between buttons, arrows in recents, Return to open

phases.name: Layout Rewrite + Launch Behavior
tasks: Add Open File to File menu

phases.name: Time-Grouped Recents + Keyboard Navigation
tasks: Add RecentTimeGroup enum and groupedRecents helper
Add arrow key navigation in recents
Add Return/Enter to open focused item

smoke_tests: Launch app → see StartView → open file → close browser → Cmd+N → see StartView again
Recents show time groups with parent folder breadcrumbs
Cmd+O opens file picker, Cmd+Shift+O opens folder picker
